description: These lifestyle boots from timberland are a perfect choice for urban wear. These high profile boots reference the Wild West in their colour and high top styling. Wear them with washed and distressed denims and a checked casual shirt with a tonal belt. This pair comes with a spare set of laces.UpperLeather upper for durability and structureHigh top stylingLace-ups for snug FitPadded collar and tongue for greater comfortLeather lining for extra comfortBrand name printed on the tongue Embossed branding on the heelMidsoleEVA midsole for impact protectionOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heel and multi-directional grooves on the forefoot and heelWash careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
